case_title: HONGZHEN WANG VS. CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO OF THE ARCHDIOCESE OF SF DB

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, HONGZHEN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY WANG, HONGZHEN AS TO DEFENDANT CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO OF THE ARCHDIOCESE OF SF DB A OMI SENIOR CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, HONGZHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO OF THE ARCHDIOCESE OF SF DB A OMI SENIOR CENTER *PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN BY A PREPONDERENCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE DAMAGES CLAIMED IN THE CASE.
